version_notes: 1.2 (2026-06-01): added two documentation categories surfaced by deterministic PDF text-layer rules (missing_sheets, revision_mismatch) introduced with the v2 plan flagger. 1.1 (2026-05-08): added 22 sub-categories surfaced from CCC Avoiding RFIs, SDC Specific Approvals, WDC fact sheets, and 2 MBIE determinations. Existing 1.0 IDs preserved; new categories use namespaced IDs. Added stages, canterbury overlays, BCA-specific process facts. SDC portal corrected to AlphaOne (verified from SDC processing page).

bcas.name: Waimakariri District Council
published_check_sheets: embedded in Let's Get it Right Guide v3

categories.label: B1 — Geotech / foundations
categories.notes: Canterbury TC1/TC2/TC3 zoning, liquefaction, scala penetrometer, foundation/geotech coordination. Distinct remediation pattern (geotech engineer letter, SED foundation, PS1+PS4).

categories.label: D1 — Access routes / accessibility
categories.notes: Accessible route detail, isolated steps (D1.3.3), wheelchair parking placement, footpath gradient — heavy commercial RFI surface at CCC.

categories.label: F9 — Pool barriers
categories.notes: Residential pool barriers, F9/AS1 paragraph 2.1.7 / 2.2.1(d), 900mm non-climbable zone, 10mm horizontal projection rule. Carved out from generic F because remediation is distinct (alternative-solution justification common). Real example: MBIE Determination 2026/013 (Selwyn).

categories.label: G1 — Personal hygiene / sanitary facilities
categories.notes: G1/AS1 sanitary facility numbers, MBIE toilet calculator, user group justification.

categories.label: G4 — Ventilation
categories.notes: Mechanical ventilation drawings + PS1; G4.3.3 contaminant spaces requiring mech vent (cannot use G1/AS1 natural ventilation).

categories.label: G12 — Water supplies
categories.notes: Backflow prevention, plumbing schematic, solar hot water.

categories.label: G13 — Foul water
categories.notes: Drainage, septic tanks (ECan approval), wastewater outfall, sewer connection.

categories.label: H1 — Envelope thermal resistance (>300m²)
categories.notes: Schedule method or modelling method report; consultant-prepared.

categories.label: H1.3.5 — Artificial lighting energy efficiency
categories.notes: NZS 4243.2:2007 schedule method calculations or electrical engineer PS1 covering H1.3.5.

categories.label: Plans — Site/floor levels & survey datum
categories.notes: Christchurch Drainage Datum, NZVD2016 / LVD1937, Building Location Certificate (BLC), FFL freeboard, FAC (SDC ≥25m²), benchmark references.

categories.label: Plans — Cross-discipline coordination
categories.notes: Architectural vs structural / fire / civil / HVAC inconsistency. Lead designer responsibility. CCC commercial RFI surface.

categories.label: PS3 — Construction
categories.notes: WDC publishes specific PS3 sub-types: wet area seal-tanking, septic & effluent disposal field, solid fuel burner installer.

categories.label: PS4 — Construction Review (monitoring)
categories.notes: Construction monitoring schedule + PS4 confirmation. CCC-heavy RFI surface for SED.

categories.label: Documentation — Owner details / vetting
categories.notes: SDC vetting RFI: applications not accepted until owner contact details complete.

categories.label: Documentation — Product assurance (BRANZ / CodeMark)
categories.notes: BRANZ appraisal numbers, CodeMark certificate of conformity + conditions of use, alternative cladding documentation, MBIE warnings/bans.

categories.label: Documentation — Specified systems & Compliance Schedule
categories.notes: Compliance Schedule, IM&R procedures, performance standards. SDC publishes a Specified Systems Information form + 1.7 MB guidance document.

categories.label: Documentation — Missing referenced sheets
categories.notes: Drawing register lists sheets that are not present in the upload. Detected deterministically from PDF text layer.

categories.label: Documentation — Revision mismatch across sheets
categories.notes: Sheets in the same set carry inconsistent revision letters, indicating a revision sync issue. Detected deterministically from title-block text.

categories.label: Process — Vetting / s45 completeness
categories.notes: SDC: vetting RFI resets the 20-day clock. CCC/WDC: incomplete applications rejected outright. Distinct from technical assessment RFIs.

categories.label: Process — Development Engineering acceptance
categories.notes: SDC-only parallel process for urban multi-unit. Lawful outfall + service layout + ECOP compliance + CPEng/SQEP certification. Own 20-day clock + own RFI cycle. Hourly fees.

categories.label: Process — Other-authority approvals
categories.notes: Network utility approvals (water capacity, wastewater capacity, stormwater outfall), trade waste, asset protection. CCC publishes 5+ specific email addresses for these.

categories.label: Process — Cross-agency referrals
categories.notes: FENZ Fire Engineering Unit (10 working days, s46), Heritage NZ (5 days notification). MBIE warnings & bans on products.

categories.label: Process — Rural site servicing
categories.notes: Effluent field design + fencing + ECan approval, potable water testing (chem+micro, 18-month rule), stormwater swales/ponds, freeboard, secondary flow path. WDC-heavy.

categories.label: Process — Change of use / unconsented habitation
categories.notes: Owner notice + Council approval before commencement. Caravans/containers/garages becoming buildings. ANARP compliance for new household units. WDC-published. Real example: MBIE Determination 2026/008 (CCC NTF).

categories.label: Process — Certificate of Acceptance (retrospective)
categories.notes: Form 8 / s96. Council not obliged to issue. Refusal recorded on LIM. Doesn't apply to Schedule 1 exempt work or pre-1992.

categories.label: Process — Planning / s37 resource consent
categories.notes: Building Act s37 notice; District/Regional Plan compliance materially affected; building consent processing suspended pending RC.

tc_zones.tc1: Standard residential green zone — minimal liquefaction; standard shallow geotech.
tc_zones.tc2: Yellow zone — minor to moderate liquefaction; standard solutions for foundation repair/rebuild.
tc_zones.tc3: Blue zone — moderate to significant liquefaction; requires site-specific geotechnical investigation and specific engineering foundation design tolerating ≥300mm global lateral displacement.

ccc_specific.datum: Christchurch Drainage Datum required for site/floor levels in flood-prone areas.

selwyn_specific.fac_required_for: New principal buildings, new residential units, or alterations ≥25m² floor area.
selwyn_specific.ecan_flood_report_required_for: Rural properties in the Plains Flood Management Overlay.
selwyn_specific.engineering_acceptance_required_for: Multi-unit residential, commercial, or industrial in urban zones (with 7-Apr-2025 minor-residential-unit exemption except MRZ).

waimakariri_specific.tc3_history: Significant TC3 land plus former residential red zones in Kaiapoi, Pines Beach, Kairaki post-2010/2011 quakes.
waimakariri_specific.validation_step: Senior Building Officer QA gate (Step 6) — distinct RFI surface.
waimakariri_specific.cca_audit_step: CCC Auditor post-final-inspection review (Step 17) — distinct RFI surface.

national_perf.source: MBIE Annual Building Consent System Performance Monitoring, year ended June 2025
